title: senecio sororius
intro: Senecio sororius, also known as Gray Ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio sororius include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Senecio sororius can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is also used in some herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
